description: Implement a Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) security model for the HR schema on localhost:1521/XEPDB1 (system/OraclePassword123, hr/hr123). Create three roles: HR_READONLY with SELECT access on non-sensitive tables (DEPARTMENTS, JOBS, LOCATIONS, COUNTRIES, REGIONS) and the V_EMPLOYEE_PUBLIC view; HR_ANALYST which inherits HR_READONLY plus SELECT on EMPLOYEES, JOB_HISTORY, and V_DEPT_SUMMARY; and HR_MANAGER which inherits HR_ANALYST plus INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE on EMPLOYEES and DEPARTMENTS. Create application users APP_READER (Reader#2024), APP_ANALYST (Analyst#2024), and APP_MANAGER (Manager#2024) and assign them their corresponding roles. Define two secure views in the HR schema: V_EMPLOYEE_PUBLIC (containing EMPLOYEES columns excluding SALARY, COMMISSION_PCT, and MANAGER_ID) and V_DEPT_SUMMARY (containing aggregated department stats: EMPLOYEE_COUNT, MIN_SALARY, MAX_SALARY, and rounded AVG_SALARY). Generate a report listing all created objects at /home/ga/Desktop/security_report.txt.
